S.FORM: Yoweri Museveni Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 9 jiyax 15 ka Yoweri Museveni ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uganda ta sayang o kiya ka Yoweri Museveni, pnaah hngkawas 1986 idas 1 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: jowəɾi musə*əni mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka jowəɾi musə*əni ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan uganda ta sajaŋ o kija ka jowəɾi musə*əni, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: Yoweri Museveni Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 9 jiyax 15 ka Yoweri Museveni ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uganda ta sayang o kiya ka Yoweri Museveni, pnaah hngkawas 1986 idas 1 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: jowəɾi musə*əni mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka jowəɾi musə*əni ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan uganda ta sajaŋ o kija ka jowəɾi musə*əni, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
